headline: Type Systems
description: Type systems assign types to program constructs, catching errors at compile time. Static typing (C, Java, Rust): types checked before execution. Dynamic typing (Python, JavaScript): types checked at runtime. Type systems prevent entire classes of bugs: null dereferences, type mismatches, memory safety violations.

citation.name: Types and Programming Languages (2025 Updated Edition)
citation.author: Pierce B.C.

citation.name: Type Systems in Modern Programming Languages: A 2025 Survey
citation.author: multiple
